nodes.label: MIDI Event
nodes.description: Incoming MIDI CC, pitchbend, aftertouch, note-on, or note-off event

nodes.label: CCNumber
nodes.description: Selects which CC/event type to listen for (0-131)

nodes.label: EnableMPE
nodes.description: MPE toggle (currently vestigial in event handler)

nodes.label: DefaultValue
nodes.description: Fallback value sent immediately when set

nodes.label: Event Filter
nodes.description: Checks event type and CC number, normalises value to 0..1
